retry_reason: Put wrapper releases a reference; if the refcount was already zero, the caller has a use-after-free bug — retrying would not help and would risk double-free.
contract_summary: This function is a reference-release (put) wrapper for an amdgpu_bo representing a GWS allocation. The caller supplies a pointer to the buffer object (cast from void* mem_obj); the function decrements its reference count via amdgpu_bo_unref. After calling this function, the caller must not use mem_obj anymore unless it holds another reference (via a previous get or creation). The function does not return a value and does not indicate success — it is assumed the object is valid. This wraps the release of a GWS buffer to the AMDGPU KFD interface, ensuring proper reference count management.
